page: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server instance belonging to the Dadsv7 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The instance features 32 dedicated virtual CPUs, which correspond to 16 physical cores with 2 threads per core, and is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 1890 GB of local SSD storage and supports Premium Storage. The hypervisor layer is managed by Microsoft Hyper-V.

In benchmark testing, the D32ads_v7 demonstrates strong CPU capabilities. Single-core performance via stress-ng and gzip compression rates place it in the top 10% tier. Multi-core performance and PassMark CPU scores rank in the top 25%, supported by hardware-accelerated instruction sets such as AVX-512 and cryptography extensions including AES and SHA_NI. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is highly efficient at 3348.45 GB/sec, though larger uncached read and write operations perform at average levels.

The instance offers a balanced resource profile, combining high-frequency processing with substantial local storage. While it lacks GPU acceleration, its CPU-based LLM text generation for small models reaches top-tier speeds. The qualitative cost efficiency is favorable for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and fast local scratch space without the premium of memory-optimized tiers. This configuration is well-suited for relational databases, static web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadsv7 family, featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz, this x86_64 instance includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core performance and strong multi-core capabilities, with AVX-512 and cryptographic acceleration. It delivers high memory bandwidth for cached operations and strong static web serving throughput. Lacking a GPU, it is optimized for CPU-driven workloads. This instance is highly suited for database operations, web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core and strong multi-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose instance with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, optimized for database and web workloads.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 platform featuring high-frequency AMD EPYC processing, generous local storage, and strong multi-core performance.

Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local SSD storage
Top-tier single-core performance and strong multi-core benchmark results
